hero.title: Time with Me
hero.subtitle: Share time with your precious people.

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to share time with others

calendar.title: Share your calendar with others
calendar.desc: Create a calendar full of gorgeous images with people around you!

crossplatform.title: On Android and iPhone
crossplatform.desc: It is available for both Android and iPhone devices.

communicate.title: Communicate together
communicate.desc: Let's communicate with each other by leaving hearts and comments on the schedule!

location.title: Record the location
location.desc: Record and share locations with images!

dday.title: Various D-day notations
dday.desc: Through various D-Day recording methods, you can count the days that fit your schedule!

category.title: Various categorization
category.desc: You can create various categories to record your schedules!

sorting.title: Different sorting methods
sorting.desc: You can find the item you want through various sorting methods!

notification.title: New post notification
notification.desc: We'll send you a notification when a new post is created on your calendar!
